title: heliophila xylopoda
intro: Heliophila xylopoda, also known as the "rock heliophila" or "rock yellowhead," is a plant species within the family Brassicaceae. Native to South Africa, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and infections. The plant's roots and leaves are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are valued for their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Heliophila xylopoda include relieving coughs, reducing fever, and soothing bronchial irritations, making it a popular remedy in traditional African medicine.
